artifacts.title: Central Bank Monitor
artifacts.description: G10 + Asia central bank rates, meeting calendar, and portfolio signals.

artifacts.title: US Fed Observer — JL
artifacts.description: Refreshed Fed monitor: IORB cycle, inflation (Dallas Trimmed Mean + Core PCE), market & model-based expectations (breakevens, Cleveland Fed EXPINF, NY Fed SCE), labor market (JOLTS, V/U, NFP, UNRATE). Data via FRED as of Jun 14 2026.

artifacts.title: U.S. Labor Sector Dashboard
artifacts.description: NFP sector payrolls by industry (BLS CES), JOLTS job openings and flows by sector. Annual, YTD, and latest m/m breakdown through May 2026.

artifacts.title: NFP YTD Sector Analysis — 2022–2026
artifacts.description: Birth-death model credibility assessment: 2026 YTD payrolls (+603K Jan–May) by sector, revision risk scoring, ADP/JOLTS cross-checks, and bear/base/bull scenario analysis.
